short_blurb: Premium roofing services for Studio City homes, hillside properties, and estates.
local_note: Studio City blends hillside canyon homes with flat-street bungalows near Ventura Blvd. The canyon properties present unique challenges: steep pitches, wood shake conversions, fire-zone requirements, and access logistics. We're experienced with Class A re-roofing on canyon homes across the Santa Monica Mountains boundary, and our crews are equipped for steep-slope work.

faqs.q: My Studio City home is in a fire hazard zone — what roofing is compliant?
faqs.a: Homes in Very High Fire Hazard Severity Zones need Class A roofing assemblies. We install fire-rated concrete tile, metal roofing, and composition shingle systems with the proper underlayment and Chapter 7A-compliant details throughout.
